mapper.sql: LEFT JOIN ( SELECT customer_id, MAX(created_at) AS last_wechat_qr_view_at FROM customer_event WHERE event_type = 'VIEW_WECHAT_QR' GROUP BY customer_id ) qr ON qr.customer_id = c.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT customer_id, event_type, created_at FROM ( SELECT customer_id, event_type, created_at, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY customer_id ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC) AS row_num FROM customer_event ) latest_event WHERE row_num = 1 ) ev ON ev.customer_id = c.id
mapper.select:
SELECT 'LOGIN_ONLY' AS row_type, c.id AS customer_id, NULL AS lead_id, c.phone AS phone, NULL AS surname, NULL AS region, NULL AS debt_amount, NULL AS debt_type, NULL AS debt_description, NULL AS age_range, NULL AS job_status, NULL AS credit_status, NULL AS monthly_income_range, NULL AS monthly_expense_range, NULL AS source, c.first_login_at AS first_login_at, NULL AS lead_created_at, CASE WHEN qr.last_wechat_qr_view_at IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END AS viewed_wechat_qr, qr.last_wechat_qr_view_at AS last_wechat_qr_view_at, ev.event_type AS latest_event_type, ev.created_at AS latest_event_at, 0 AS history_count FROM customer c
LEFT JOIN lead_record l ON l.customer_id = c.id WHERE c.status = 'ACTIVE' AND l.id IS NULL
AND c.phone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.keyword}, '%')
AND qr.last_wechat_qr_view_at IS NOT NULL
AND qr.last_wechat_qr_view_at IS NULL
AND c.first_login_at >= #{query.startTime}
AND c.first_login_at <= #{query.endTime}
